title: glaucium corniculatum var. caricum
intro: Glaucium corniculatum var. caricum, also known as the horn poppy or yellow hornpoppy, is a plant species within the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve coughs due to its antitussive and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Glaucium corniculatum var. caricum include its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to create teas or tinctures that are said to aid in the relief of respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
